title: Layla and Majnun: Love unto Madness
description: The Romeo and Juliet of the East: Qays' love for Layla drives him to madness, wandering the desert speaking to animals.
introduction: The Romeo and Juliet of the East: Qays' love for Layla drives him to madness, wandering the desert speaking to animals.

translation.original_text: عشق آمد و شد چو خون به رگهایم
translation.text: Love came and flowed like blood through my veins.
